store.name: prompts.chat
store.tagline: AI-powered prompt library for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more.

apps.name: prompts.chat
apps.subtitle: AI prompt library browser extension
apps.description: Browser extension that provides one-click access to a curated prompt library for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, and 40+ AI platforms.
apps.longDescription: prompts.chat is a browser extension built on top of the Awesome ChatGPT Prompts collection. It lets you instantly run prompts on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, and more with one click. Features include smart filtering by category, tags, and prompt type (Text, Image, Audio, Video), variable customization with real-time preview, side panel mode, dark/light mode, syntax highlighting for structured prompts, and quick copy to clipboard. Available for Chrome and Firefox.
features: One-click prompt execution on 40+ AI platforms
Smart filtering by category, tags, and prompt type
Side panel mode for browsing while using prompts
